info.title: PizzaHap API
info.description: PizzaHap pizza ordering platform API. v4: no tax system (total = subtotal - discount + delivery_fee), categories carry has_toppings/has_crust flags, full PayU payment + refund flow, admin manages categories/crusts/product-sizes, in-house orders auto-confirm and auto-mark COD paid.

coins_to_redeem.description: Number of coins to redeem. 1 coin = Rs.1 discount.

location_id.description: Auto-set from admin token if location-scoped

has_toppings.description: Show toppings selector for products in this category

has_crust.description: Show crust selector for products in this category

mihpayid.description: PayU payment ID from payment callback

tags.name: Menu
tags.description: Public menu — products, categories, toppings, crusts

tags.name: Admin — Orders
tags.description: Order management, in-house billing, payment status

get.summary: Get all active locations, sorted by distance if lat/lng provided
Get the nearest branch to given coordinates
Get a single location by ID

post.summary: Register new user with OTP verification

201.description: User created. Returns accessToken, refreshToken, and user object.

200.description: Returns accessToken, refreshToken, and user object.

get.summary: Get current user profile — includes structured address fields and coin_balance

put.summary: Update profile — supports both legacy address string and structured fields

get.summary: List all active categories
get.description: Returns active categories. Each object includes has_toppings and has_crust flags. Use these to decide whether to show topping/crust selectors in the UI.

get.summary: List products. Pass location_id to exclude items unavailable at that branch.

parameters.name: location_id
parameters.description: Filters out products disabled at this location

get.summary: Get featured products
Get single product with sizes, crusts, available toppings and ratings

200.description: Product detail with sizes, crusts, toppings, avg_rating

404.description: Not found or unavailable at location

get.description: Full product detail. crusts array is only populated if the category has has_crust=true. toppings array is only populated if the category has has_toppings=true. Check has_toppings and has_crust to conditionally render selectors.

get.summary: List all available toppings
List all available crust types

post.summary: Calculate order total — supports coupon + coins redemption preview

200.description: Breakdown of subtotal, discounts, coins, taxes and final total

post.description: Preview totals before placing order. tax_amount is always 0. total_amount = subtotal - discount_amount - coins_discount + delivery_fee

201.description: Order placed. Returns order_id, order_number, total_amount, coins_redeemed, coins_discount.

get.summary: Get my orders (paginated)
Get my coin wallet balance and full transaction history
Get order detail with items, status history, payment and feedback

200.description: Full order object including items (with toppings), status_history, payment, feedback

get.summary: Get invoice data for an order

200.description: Invoice object with line items, taxes (CGST/SGST), and coins_redeemed

post.summary: Cancel an order (only pending or confirmed status)

200.description: Cancelled. Redeemed coins are automatically restored to wallet.

post.summary: Get cart items from a previous order for reordering

200.description: Array of cart items ready to pass to /orders

post.summary: Submit feedback for a delivered order (food, delivery, overall ratings + comment)
post.description: Only allowed on orders with status = 'delivered'. One feedback per order.

400.description: Order not delivered or feedback already submitted

post.summary: Rate an individual product from a delivered order

get.summary: Get all ratings for a product
List all currently active and valid coupons

200.description: Array of coupon objects (public fields only)

post.summary: Validate a coupon code and calculate discount

400.description: Invalid, expired, or per-user limit reached

get.summary: Get my notifications (last 50)

put.summary: Mark all my notifications as read
Mark a single notification as read

post.summary: Request a refund for an eligible order

201.description: Refund request submitted. Earned coins will be reverted if refund is approved.

get.summary: Get my refund requests
Get my support tickets
Get messages in a ticket

post.summary: Admin login — returns JWT token scoped to location

location_id.description: Optional — super_admin only. Scopes the session to a branch.

200.description: token + admin object including role, location_id, location_name

get.summary: KPI summary — today's orders/revenue, pending orders, popular products. Auto-scoped to admin's location.
Revenue & order reports by period
List all orders — auto-filtered by admin's location. Super-admin can pass location_id.

schema.description: Filter by payment status — useful to find unpaid COD orders

200.description: Paginated orders with user_name, user_mobile, location_name, payment_method, coins_redeemed

post.summary: Place an in-house / walk-in order on behalf of a user (or anonymously)
post.description: Place an in-house / walk-in order at the counter. Auto-confirms immediately. COD orders are auto-marked as paid — no /payment-status step required. No tax applied. total_amount = subtotal + delivery_fee.

201.description: In-house order created. Returns order_id, order_number, total_amount, payment_method.

get.summary: Get full order detail — items, toppings, status history, payment, customer info, feedback

404.description: Not found (or not in admin's location scope)

put.summary: Update order status — validates allowed transitions. Triggers user notification. Credits coins on 'delivered'.
put.description: Allowed transitions: pending→confirmed/cancelled, confirmed→preparing/cancelled, preparing→out_for_delivery/cancelled, out_for_delivery→delivered, delivered→refund_requested

200.description: Status updated. If delivered, coins are automatically credited to user (1 coin per Rs.10).

put.summary: Update payment status — use to mark COD orders as paid when cash is received
put.description: For COD orders: mark 'paid' once cash is collected. For prepaid: status is updated automatically by payment gateway. User receives a notification on any change.

200.description: Payment status updated and user notified

get.summary: Get invoice for any order — works for walk-ins too (shows 'Walk-in' as customer name)

200.description: Invoice object including coins_redeemed, payment_method, payment_status

get.summary: Get ALL products including unavailable. Returns location_available for scoped admins.

200.description: Paginated products with category_name and location_available

sizes.description: If omitted, a single 'Regular' size is created at base_price

put.summary: Toggle product availability at a specific location (per-location override)

location_id.description: Required for super_admin only; ignored for location-scoped admins

get.summary: Get availability for this product across ALL locations (super_admin view)
List all toppings (including unavailable)
List all locations (including inactive)

post.summary: Create a new branch location (super_admin only)

get.summary: List all coupons (including expired and inactive)

put.summary: Update a coupon (e.g. deactivate, extend validity, change discount)

get.summary: List all users — includes address fields and coin_balance

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or mobile

200.description: Paginated user list with coin_balance and address fields

put.summary: Block or unblock a user (super_admin / admin only)

get.summary: Get admin notifications — scoped to admin's location. Super-admin sees all.

put.summary: Mark all admin notifications as read
Mark a single admin notification as read

post.summary: Send a notification to users — omit user_ids to broadcast to ALL active users

message.example: Get 20% off on all large pizzas this weekend.

user_ids.description: Omit to broadcast to all active non-blocked users

get.summary: List all refund requests

200.description: Array of refunds with order_number, user info, coins_earned

post.summary: Approve or reject a refund. On approval: coins_earned are reverted and user is notified.

200.description: Refund processed. Coins auto-reverted on approval.

get.summary: List all support tickets (filtered by admin location)

post.summary: Initiate a PayU payment for a placed order
post.description: Step 1 of payment flow. For online payments returns payu_params — POST these fields to https://test.payu.in/_payment (or https://secure.payu.in/_payment in production). For cash_on_delivery confirms order immediately, no further steps needed. surl and furl are both set to POST /api/payments/payu-webhook.

201.description: Online: {txnid, amount, currency, order_id, order_number, payu_params{key,txnid,amount,productinfo,firstname,email,phone,surl,furl,hash,udf1}}. COD: {payment_method:"cash_on_delivery", order_id}

404.description: Order not found or already paid

post.summary: Verify PayU payment after redirect (client-side callback)
post.description: Step 2 of online payment flow — call from your redirect handler. Accepts PayU field names (txnid, mihpayid, hash) or legacy Razorpay aliases (razorpay_order_id, razorpay_payment_id, razorpay_signature). On success marks payment captured and order confirmed.
PayU posts to this URL for both success and failure. Configure as both surl and furl. Accepts application/x-www-form-urlencoded. Handles status: success | failure | failed | cancel | cancelled.

get.summary: List all categories including inactive

200.description: Array of Category objects. Each includes has_toppings and has_crust flags.

post.description: Set has_toppings=true so products in this category show a toppings selector (e.g. Pizzas). Set has_crust=true to show the crust selector.

put.summary: Update category fields including has_toppings / has_crust

get.summary: List all crust types including unavailable
List all sizes for a product

post.summary: Add a size to a product
